overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character traversing a coastal environment during a dramatic sunset. The character moves continuously from a shaded forested path onto an open sandy beach and wades through shallow ocean water, with large rock formations and vibrant orange skies in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested coastal path with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: samurai character running along a narrow coastal path beneath pine trees, heading toward the beach

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered in vegetation forming the left boundary of the path
dark silhouetted pine trees creating canopy cover over the trail
large sunlit rock formation with a torii gate visible on top, standing in the ocean
smaller rock outcropping in the ocean with waves crashing around it

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs through a narrow coastal path shaded by pine trees and rocky cliffs. The ground is covered with dark soil and patches of purple wildflowers. Ahead, a large sunlit rock island with a torii gate is visible through the trees against an orange sunset sky.

events.description: exits tree-covered coastal path onto open sandy beach

agents.ego_description: running across the golden sand toward the water's edge with the large rock island ahead

entered.detail: expanse of golden sand illuminated by warm sunset light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the trees, the character runs onto a wide sandy beach bathed in warm sunset light. The large rock island with its torii gate is now clearly visible to the left across the water, while the open sky displays dramatic orange and red clouds.

events.description: character enters shallow ocean water and begins wading along the shore

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow ocean water along the shoreline, moving past the large rock formation

entered.detail: calm shallow water reflecting the orange and red sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters the shallow water and continues wading along the coast. The water reflects the dramatic sunset colors while gentle waves lap at the shore. The large rock formation shifts from the left to the right side of the frame as the character curves along the beach, with the sandy shore now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai transitions from a shaded coastal forest onto a wide, sun-drenched beach. It begins with the character running along a narrow path of dark soil and purple wildflowers, flanked by pine trees and rocky cliffs that partially obscure a distant torii gate on a sunlit island. As the samurai emerges from the tree line, the environment opens into a vast sandy expanse bathed in warm light under a dramatic sky of orange and red clouds. The scene then shifts as the character enters the shallow ocean, where the water reflects the vibrant sunset colors and gentle waves lap at the shore. Finally, the camera curves along the coastline, causing the large rock formation to shift from the left to the right side of the frame as the sandy beach recedes.
